Skip to contents
sigurd 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    SiGURD vignette

    Function reference

    All functions

    AmpliconSupplementing()
    Supplementing scRNAseq values with Amplicon values
    AmpliconSupplementing_big()
    Supplementing scRNAseq values with Amplicon values using big.matrix
    CalculateAlleleFrequency()
    We calculate the consensus information from the MAEGATK results.
    CalculateConsensus()
    We calculate the consensus information from the MAEGATK results.
    CalculateCorrelationPValue()
    We perform the correlation of SNVs and calculate the P values.
    CalculateCoverage()
    We calculate the coverage information per variant from the MAEGATK results.
    CalculateFisherTestPValue()
    We perform the Fisher Testest of SNVs and calculate the P values.
    CombineSEobjects()
    We combine two SummarizedExperiment objects.
    CombineSEobjects_big()
    We combine two SummarizedExperiment objects with big matrices.
    Filtering()
    Filtering the loaded genotyping data.
    Filtering_big()
    Filtering the loaded genotyping data using big matrices.
    GetCellInfoPerVariant()
    We get the variant information per cell.
    HeatmapVoi()
    We plot a heatmap of a set of Variants Of Interest using the Variant Allele Frequency values of a SummarizedExperiment object.
    LoadingMAEGATK_typewise()
    We load the MAEGATK output and transform it to be compatible with the VarTrix output.
    LoadingVarTrix()
    Loading VarTrix results for the down stream analysis.
    LoadingVarTrix_typewise()
    When we load all the different types of results (scRNAseq/amplicon and MT/amplicon), we might need extreme amounts of memory. To solve this issue, I will load each type separately. In a following function (AmpliconSupplementing), we can add the amplicon information to the scRNAseq information.
    LoadingVarTrix_typewise_big()
    Loading VarTrix results using big.matrix
    Merging_SE_list()
    Merging list of SummarizedExperiment objects.
    RowWiseSplit()
    We get the filtered results, we have from the 01_FilteringSampleWise. We now split the results into the individual columns and save them in a list object.
    SeparatingMatrixToList()
    We separate a matrix of variant information to a list. Each variant is an entry in the list.
    VariantBurden()
    Calculate the variant burden per cell.
    VariantBurden_big()
    Calculate the variant burden per cell using big matrices.
    VariantCloneSizeThresholding()
    We get variants of interest using a clone size thresholding.
    VariantCorrelationHeatmap()
    We generate a heatmap showing the correlation of somatic variants with the MT variants.
    VariantFisherTestHeatmap()
    We generate a heatmap showing the Fisher test of somatic variants with the MT variants.
    VariantQuantileThresholding()
    We get variants of interest using the quantile thresholding.
    VariantWiseCorrelation()
    We get some descriptive statistics for each sample. We use the genotyping results for this. fraction_interesting_subset.Rds consensus_matrix_interesting_subset.Rds Instead of running a loop, we run the script in a job array. We subset the matrices to only include the specific sample and we calculate the correlations.
    VariantWiseFisherTest()
    We perform the Fisher test to determine which variants are associated.
    combine_NAMES()
    We combine two vectors of names.
    combine_SparseMatrix()
    We combine two sparse matrices
    computeAFMutMatrix()
    Calculate the allele frequency per variant. This function originally written by
    getAltMatrix()
    We get the alt values from the MAEGATK results.
    getReadMatrix()
    Get the counts for a specific base over all positions.
    getRefMatrix()
    We get the reference values from the MAEGATK result.
    get_consensus()
    We get the consensus information for a specific matrix.
    ggsci_pal()
    Function to return colours from a ggsci palette.
    load_object()
    We define a loading function to load the RDS files quicker.
    save_object()
    We define a loading function to save the RDS files quicker.
    sdiv()
    Division of sparse matrix.

    Developed by Martin Grasshoff.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.0.3.
